rationale.D1: Confirmed IO layer is universal across all mechanisms (ModuleIOSim, FlywheelIOSim, HoodIOSim via SingleJointedArmSim, SlamIOSim, RollerSystemIOSim, VisionIONorthstar, LedsIOHAL); hardware impls are stripped in the public repo but anonymous stubs confirm the pattern is live; RollerSystem is a generic parameterized base reused across intake/hopper/kicker — library-grade generalization meriting L4.
rationale.D2: No Superstructure coordinator class exists; each subsystem (Slamtake, Hopper, Kicker, Hood, Flywheel) has its own Goal enum and internal state machine, and RobotContainer wires them together with direct per-subsystem goal-setting commands — explicit per-subsystem FSMs (L2) without a central fanout coordinator (would require L3), so scored 2.5.
rationale.D3: Confirmed WPILib physics sims in every mechanism IOSim (DCMotorSim for rollers/flywheel/slam, SingleJointedArmSim for hood, DCMotorSim for drive modules), plus simgui configs in sim/ folder; REPLAY mode is fully wired in Robot.java with WPILOGReader/Writer — replay as primary verification workflow confirmed, meriting L4.
rationale.D4: No src/test/java tree found, no @Test annotations anywhere in src, build.gradle has JUnit configured but empty — no tests exist; mechanical candidate 0 confirmed.
rationale.D5: Confirmed AdvantageKit: @AutoLog on all IO input structs, Logger.processInputs across 13 subsystem inputs, WPILOGWriter on REAL + WPILOGReader/Writer replay on REPLAY mode (Robot.java lines 90-106), AScope assets committed — full replay workflow actively configured, L4.
rationale.D6: Confirmed Choreo trajectories generated from code via VTS system (DriveTrajectories, GenerateTrajectories, ChoreoLauncher) and loaded at runtime via Choreo.loadTrajectory in AutoBuilder; DriveToPose for align-to-target; SalesAssociate uses org.wpilib.math.optimization.Problem (NLP autodiff optimizer) for reactive real-time field ball path planning — exceeds L3 Choreo, meets L4 reactive planning.
rationale.D7: Confirmed RobotState class with three TimeInterpolatableBuffers (pose, slam, rotation), multi-camera VisionIO[] array in Vision.java, stdDev-based Kalman gain fusion in addVisionObservation, ambiguity threshold rejection (error0/error1 check), VisionIONorthstar hardware impl — dedicated world-model architecture at L4.
rationale.D8: Confirmed spotless formatter enforced in build.gradle, detailed README with setup steps and multi-season links (2022-2026), docs/ folder with technical docs, 5 public season repos — but .github/workflows absent from public repo (CI is private-side only), discounting to L3 rather than L4.
